message:
test(voi_debug_overlay): add 18 edge-case tests for VOI debug overlay (bd-3szd1)

Cover width=0/1, empty title, tick/source combinations, render size
thresholds, NaN posterior values, large event_idx, multiple ledger
entries, negative log BF, data type cloning, and divider width.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
